title: Fundamental Concepts of Group Theory (Grimaldi)
description: A flowchart showing the hierarchical structure of key concepts in introductory group theory, from the most fundamental building blocks to more complex structures.
relationships: A Set with a Binary Operation forms a foundation
Closure, Associativity, Identity, and Inverses are the four Group Axioms
Fulfilling all four axioms defines a Group
A Group that is also Commutative is an Abelian Group
A Group with finite order is a Finite Group
A subset of a Group that is itself a Group is a Subgroup
A Group generated by a single element is a Cyclic Group
